ValidationRule.description: This prevents users who are not from the HR or IT team from updating the users' details.
ValidationRule.errorConditionFormula: AND( $User.PS480FunctionValidationRulesActive__c =true, $User.IsHRManager__c = false, $User.PS160RoleITManager__c = false, OR( ISCHANGED( Department ), ISCHANGED( Division ), ISCHANGED( Extension ), ISCHANGED( Fax ), ISCHANGED( MobilePhone ), ISCHANGED( EmployeeNumber ), ISCHANGED( StartDay ), ISCHANGED( EndDay ), ISCHANGED( Street ), ISCHANGED( PostalCode ), ISCHANGED( City ), ISCHANGED( State ), ISCHANGED( Country ), ISCHANGED( TimeZoneSidKey ), ISCHANGED( LocaleSidKey ) ) )
ValidationRule.errorMessage: You are not allowed to change the data of your User Profile. Please get in touch with HR or IT (US004).
